extraction.one_line_summary: DOMBROWSKI Joe attacked from 25-rider break on final climb, won by 13 seconds over DE MARCHI Alessandro who took maglia rosa
tactical_patterns: 25-rider fuga bidone formation after long early stalemate signals peloton's willingness to concede 6+ minutes on weather stages
LANDA Mikel attacking peloton on final climb with GC group responding shows hierarchy already established despite minimal time gaps
DE MARCHI Alessandro targeting pink jersey seconds rather than stage win from break reveals Israel team's strategic priority shift

rider_signals.DOMBROWSKI Joe: positive: First European win after years of Giro stage hunting, former Baby Giro winner rediscovering climbing form
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: positive: First career pink jersey at age 34, tactically chose GC seconds over stage victory
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Initiated GC group acceleration on final climb, showing early race aggression despite flat stage following
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: Best-placed major GC contender, taking white jersey and limiting losses in chaotic conditions
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: Lost significant time compared to GC rivals, unexpected weakness on modest Apennine finish
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: Protected by peloton but didn't distance rivals, pink jersey team working despite leader losing jersey
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: Lost pink jersey as expected while working for BERNAL, fulfilling domestique role on climbing stage
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: positive: In elite group with LANDA on final climb, positioning well among GC contenders
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: neutral: Followed key moves in GC group, maintaining position without showing exceptional form
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Lost more time than primary GC group, distanced from favorites on moderate climb
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: Gapped from main GC group, unexpected time loss for protected rider
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: Distanced with NIBALI group, concerning deficit on relatively modest summit finish
rider_signals.TAARAMÄE Rein: positive: Bridged to lead break trio targeting pink jersey, strong opportunistic positioning before final climb
rider_signals.FIORELLI Filippo: positive: Third place from break, outperformed expectations on uphill finish
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: positive: Break performance into third on GC, exploiting chaotic stage for position
rider_signals.TRATNIK Jan: positive: Top five from break on uphill finish, showing climbing form beyond expectations
